notes.msa_conservation: One minus normalized entropy; higher means more conserved.
notes.msa_match_state_coverage: 1.0 if the wild-type residue is represented by an MSA match-state column; 0.0 if it is lowercase/query-only in the A2M and receives a neutral uniform baseline.
notes.msa_normalized_entropy: Shannon entropy over amino-acid frequencies, normalized by log(20).
notes.msa_wild_type_frequency: Frequency of the wild-type amino acid at this alignment column.
